_meta.title: RIFE VFI — pure PyTorch, no cupy needed. Primary interpolation engine.

_meta.description: Takes 2+ keyframes and interpolates between them using RIFE VFI (4x). Pure PyTorch — no cupy dependency.

confirmed_results.character_identity: PASS — character preserved across interpolated frames
confirmed_results.pose_transitions: PASS — smooth transitions between keyframe poses

alternatives.FILM VFI: WORKS — pure PyTorch, no cupy needed. Good quality, slightly more ghosting than RIFE.
alternatives.GMFSS Fortuna VFI: BLOCKED — requires cupy module which is unavailable. Do NOT use.
alternatives.AMT VFI: UNTESTED — same node pack, available as backup.
alternatives.CAIN VFI: UNTESTED — same node pack, available as backup.
alternatives.FLAVR VFI: UNTESTED — same node pack, available as backup.

constraints.attention: SDPA only — do NOT install xformers
constraints.checkpoint: rife49.pth (latest RIFE model in the node pack)
